tEn: Rainbow: Combining Improvements in Deep Reinforcement Learning
tZh: 彩虹：融合深度强化学习的多项改进
sEn: Combining six DQN extensions yields state-of-the-art Atari performance.
sZh: 将六种DQN扩展相结合，在Atari基准上实现了最先进的性能。
absEn: The deep reinforcement learning community has made several independent improvements to the DQN algorithm. However, it is unclear which of these extensions are complementary and can be fruitfully combined. This paper examines six extensions to the DQN algorithm and empirically studies their combination. Our experiments show that the combination provides state-of-the-art performance on the Atari 2600 benchmark, both in terms of data efficiency and final performance. We also provide results from a detailed ablation study that shows the contribution of each component to overall performance.
absZh: 深度强化学习社区对DQN算法进行了多项独立的改进。然而，目前尚不清楚这些扩展中哪些是互补的，可以有效地结合起来。本文研究了DQN算法的六种扩展，并实证研究了它们的组合效果。我们的实验表明，这种组合在Atari 2600基准测试中，无论是在数据效率还是最终性能方面，都达到了最先进的水平。我们还提供了详细的消融研究结果，展示了每个组成部分对整体性能的贡献。

contrib.en: Integrates six DQN extensions into a single agent, Rainbow, achieving state-of-the-art performance on Atari 2600.
contrib.zh: 将六种DQN扩展整合为单一智能体Rainbow，在Atari 2600上达到最先进性能。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that prioritized replay and multi-step learning are the most crucial components for performance.
contrib.zh: 证明优先回放和多步学习是对性能最关键的两个组件。

contrib.en: Shows that distributional Q-learning improves final performance, especially on games near or above human level.
contrib.zh: 展示分布式Q学习提升最终性能，尤其在接近或超越人类水平的游戏上。

contrib.en: Provides a detailed ablation study quantifying each component's contribution to overall performance.
contrib.zh: 提供详细消融研究，量化每个组件对整体性能的贡献。

contrib.en: Achieves data efficiency by matching DQN's final performance after only 7 million frames.
contrib.zh: 仅用700万帧即达到DQN最终性能，实现数据效率提升。

contrib.en: Uses a dueling network architecture adapted for return distributions and noisy layers for exploration.
contrib.zh: 采用适用于回报分布的对偶网络架构和用于探索的噪声层。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to Atari 2600 games; generalization to other domains not tested.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于Atari 2600游戏，未测试对其他领域的泛化性。

limits.en: Hyper-parameters tuned manually via coordinate descent; no exhaustive search performed.
limits.zh: 超参数通过手动坐标下降调整，未进行穷举搜索。

limits.en: Does not explore parallelism or scalability; wall-clock time comparisons not provided.
limits.zh: 未探索并行性或可扩展性，未提供实际时间比较。

limits.en: Reward clipping may limit the effectiveness of double Q-learning in the distributional setting.
limits.zh: 奖励裁剪可能限制双重Q学习在分布式设置中的有效性。

limits.en: Only value-based methods considered; policy-based and actor-critic methods excluded.
limits.zh: 仅考虑基于价值的方法，排除了基于策略和演员-评论家方法。

items.en: The deep reinforcement learning community has made several independent improvements to the DQN algorithm. However, it is unclear which of these extensions are complementary and can be fruitfully combined. This paper examines six extensions to the DQN algorithm and empirically studies their combination. Our experiments show that the combination provides state-of-the-art performance on the Atari 2600 benchmark, both in terms of data efficiency and final performance. We also provide results from a detailed ablation study that shows the contribution of each component to overall performance.
items.zh: 深度强化学习社区对 DQN 算法进行了多项独立的改进。然而，目前尚不清楚这些扩展中哪些是互补的，并且可以有效地结合。本文研究了 DQN 算法的六种扩展，并实证研究了它们的组合。我们的实验表明，该组合在 Atari 2600 基准测试中提供了最先进的性能，无论是在数据效率还是最终性能方面。我们还提供了详细的消融研究结果，显示了每个组件对整体性能的贡献。

items.en: The many recent successes in scaling reinforcement learning (RL) to complex sequential decision-making problems were kick-started by the Deep Q-Networks algorithm (DQN; ? ?, ?). Its combination of Q-learning with convolutional neural networks and experience replay enabled it to learn, from raw pixels, how to play many Atari games at human-level performance. Since then, many extensions have been proposed that enhance its speed or stability.
items.zh: 最近将强化学习扩展到复杂序列决策问题的许多成功，都是由深度 Q 网络算法（DQN；? ?, ?）启动的。它将 Q 学习与卷积神经网络和经验回放相结合，使其能够从原始像素中学习，以人类水平玩许多 Atari 游戏。此后，提出了许多扩展来增强其速度或稳定性。

items.en: Double DQN (DDQN; ? ?) addresses an overestimation bias of Q-learning (?), by decoupling selection and evaluation of the bootstrap action. Prioritized experience replay (?) improves data efficiency, by replaying more often transitions from which there is more to learn. The dueling network architecture (?) helps to generalize across actions by separately representing state values and action advantages. Learning from multi-step bootstrap targets (?; ?), as used in A3C (?), shifts the bias-variance trade-off and helps to propagate newly observed rewards faster to earlier visited states. Distributional Q-learning (?) learns a categorical distribution of discounted returns, instead of estimating the mean. Noisy DQN (?) uses stochastic network layers for exploration. This list is, of course, far from exhaustive.
items.zh: Double DQN（DDQN；? ?）通过解耦自举动作的选择和评估，解决了 Q 学习的高估偏差（?）。优先经验回放（?）通过更频繁地回放那些有更多学习价值的转移，提高了数据效率。决斗网络架构（?）通过分别表示状态值和动作优势，帮助跨动作泛化。从多步自举目标（?; ?）学习，如 A3C（?）中所用，改变了偏差-方差权衡，并有助于将新观察到的奖励更快地传播到早期访问的状态。分布 Q 学习（?）学习折扣回报的分类分布，而不是估计均值。Noisy DQN（?）使用随机网络层进行探索。当然，这个列表远非详尽。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Median human-normalized performance across 57 Atari games. We compare our integrated agent (rainbow-colored) to DQN (grey) and six published baselines. Note that we match DQN’s best performance after 7M frames, surpass any baseline within 44M frames, and reach substantially improved final performance. Curves are smoothed with a moving average over 5 points.
items.capZh: 图 1：57 个 Atari 游戏的中位数人类归一化性能。我们将我们的集成智能体（彩虹色）与 DQN（灰色）和六个已发表的基线进行比较。注意，我们在 700 万帧后匹配了 DQN 的最佳性能，在 4400 万帧内超越了任何基线，并达到了显著提高的最终性能。曲线经过 5 点移动平均平滑。

items.en: Each of these algorithms enables substantial performance improvements in isolation. Since they do so by addressing radically different issues, and since they build on a shared framework, they could plausibly be combined. In some cases this has been done: Prioritized DDQN and Dueling DDQN both use double Q-learning, and Dueling DDQN was also combined with prioritized experience replay. In this paper we propose to study an agent that combines all the aforementioned ingredients. We show how these different ideas can be integrated, and that they are indeed largely complementary. In fact, their combination results in new state-of-the-art results on the benchmark suite of 57 Atari 2600 games from the Arcade Learning Environment (?), both in terms of data efficiency and of final performance. Finally we show results from ablation studies to help understand the contributions of the different components.
items.zh: 这些算法中的每一个在单独使用时都能实现显著的性能提升。由于它们解决的是完全不同的问题，并且建立在共享框架之上，因此它们很可能可以组合。在某些情况下，这已经实现：优先 DDQN 和决斗 DDQN 都使用了双 Q 学习，而决斗 DDQN 也与优先经验回放结合。在本文中，我们提出研究一个结合了上述所有成分的智能体。我们展示了如何整合这些不同的想法，并且它们确实是很大程度上互补的。事实上，它们的组合在 Arcade 学习环境（?）的 57 个 Atari 2600 游戏基准套件上产生了新的最先进结果，无论是在数据效率还是最终性能方面。最后，我们展示了消融研究的结果，以帮助理解不同组件的贡献。

items.en: Reinforcement learning addresses the problem of an agent learning to act in an environment in order to maximize a scalar reward signal. No direct supervision is provided to the agent, for instance it is never directly told the best action.
items.zh: 强化学习解决的是智能体学习在环境中行动以最大化标量奖励信号的问题。智能体没有直接监督，例如，它从未被告知最佳动作。

items.en: The policy may be learned directly, or it may be constructed as a function of some other learned quantities. In value-based reinforcement learning, the agent learns an estimate of the expected discounted return, or value, when following a policy π𝜋\pi starting from a given state, vπ​(s)=Eπ​[Gt|St=s]superscript𝑣𝜋𝑠subscript𝐸𝜋delimited-[]conditionalsubscript𝐺𝑡subscript𝑆𝑡𝑠v^{\pi}(s)=E_{\pi}[G_{t}|S_{t}=s], or state-action pair, qπ​(s,a)=Eπ​[Gt|St=s,At=a]superscript𝑞𝜋𝑠𝑎subscript𝐸𝜋delimited-[]formulae-sequenceconditionalsubscript𝐺𝑡subscript𝑆𝑡𝑠subscript𝐴𝑡𝑎q^{\pi}(s,a)=E_{\pi}[G_{t}|S_{t}=s,A_{t}=a]. A common way of deriving a new policy from a state-action value function is to act ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon-greedily with respect to the action values. This corresponds to taking the action with the highest value (the greedy action) with probability (1−ϵ)1italic-ϵ(1-\epsilon), and to otherwise act uniformly at random with probability ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon. Policies of this kind are used to introduce a form of exploration: by randomly selecting actions that are sub-optimal according to its current estimates, the agent can discover and correct its estimates when appropriate. The main limitation is that it is difficult to discover alternative courses of action that extend far into the future; this has motivated research on more directed forms of exploration.
items.zh: 策略可以直接学习，也可以作为其他学习量的函数构建。在基于值的强化学习中，智能体学习在遵循策略 π 从给定状态开始时期望折扣回报（即值）的估计，v^π(s) = E_π[G_t | S_t=s]，或状态-动作对，q^π(s,a) = E_π[G_t | S_t=s, A_t=a]。从状态-动作值函数推导新策略的常见方法是相对于动作值进行 ε-贪婪行动。这对应于以概率 (1-ε) 采取具有最高值的动作（贪婪动作），否则以概率 ε 均匀随机行动。这种策略用于引入一种探索形式：通过随机选择根据当前估计次优的动作，智能体可以在适当时发现并纠正其估计。主要限制是难以发现延伸到未来的替代行动方案；这激发了对更直接探索形式的研究。

items.en: Large state and/or action spaces make it intractable to learn Q value estimates for each state and action pair independently. In deep reinforcement learning, we represent the various components of agents, such as policies π​(s,a)𝜋𝑠𝑎\pi(s,a) or values q​(s,a)𝑞𝑠𝑎q(s,a), with deep (i.e., multi-layer) neural networks. The parameters of these networks are trained by gradient descent to minimize some suitable loss function.
items.zh: 大的状态和/或动作空间使得独立学习每个状态和动作对的 Q 值估计变得棘手。在深度强化学习中，我们使用深度（即多层）神经网络来表示智能体的各种组件，如策略 π(s,a) 或值 q(s,a)。这些网络的参数通过梯度下降训练，以最小化某个合适的损失函数。

The gradient of the loss is back-propagated only into the parameters θ𝜃\theta of the online network (which is also used to select actions); the term θ¯¯𝜃\overline{\theta} represents the parameters of a target network; a periodic copy of the online network which is not directly optimized. items.en: DQN has been an important milestone, but several limitations of this algorithm are now known, and many extensions have been proposed. We propose a selection of six extensions that each have addressed a limitation and improved overall performance. To keep the size of the selection manageable, we picked a set of extensions that address distinct concerns (e.g., just one of the many addressing exploration).
items.zh: DQN 是一个重要的里程碑，但该算法的一些局限性现已已知，并且提出了许多扩展。我们提出了六个扩展的选择，每个扩展都解决了一个局限性并提高了整体性能。为了保持选择规模的可管理性，我们选择了一组解决不同问题的扩展（例如，仅一个解决探索问题的扩展）。

items.en: Conventional Q-learning is affected by an overestimation bias, due to the maximization step in Equation 1, and this can harm learning. Double Q-learning (?), addresses this overestimation by decoupling, in the maximization performed for the bootstrap target, the selection of the action from its evaluation. items.zh: 这一改变被证明可以减少 DQN 中存在的有害高估，从而提高性能。

items.en: We can learn to approximate the distribution of returns instead of the expected return. Recently Bellemare, Dabney, and Munos (2017) proposed to model such distributions with probability masses placed on a discrete support 𝒛𝒛{\bm{z}}, where 𝒛𝒛\bm{z} is a vector with Natoms∈ℕ+subscript𝑁atomssuperscriptℕN_{\text{atoms}}\in\mathbb{N}^{+} atoms, defined by zi=vmin+(i−1)​vmax−vminNatoms−1superscript𝑧𝑖subscript𝑣𝑖1subscript𝑣subscript𝑣subscript𝑁atoms1z^{i}=v_{\min}+(i-1)\frac{v_{\max}-v_{\min}}{N_{\text{atoms}}-1} for i∈{1,…,Natoms}𝑖1…subscript𝑁atomsi\in\{1,\ldots,N_{\text{atoms}}\}. The approximating distribution dtsubscript𝑑𝑡d_{t} at time t𝑡t is defined on this support, with the probability mass pθi​(St,At)subscriptsuperscript𝑝𝑖𝜃subscript𝑆𝑡subscript𝐴𝑡p^{i}_{\theta}(S_{t},A_{t}) on each atom i𝑖i, such that dt=(𝒛,𝒑θ​(St,At))subscript𝑑𝑡𝒛subscript𝒑𝜃subscript𝑆𝑡subscript𝐴𝑡d_{t}=(\bm{z},\bm{p}_{\theta}(S_{t},A_{t})). The goal is to update θ𝜃\theta such that this distribution closely matches the actual distribution of returns.
items.zh: 我们可以学习近似收益的分布，而不是期望收益。最近，Bellemare、Dabney和Munos（2017）提出用放置在离散支持集z上的概率质量来建模此类分布，其中z是一个包含Natoms∈ℕ+个原子的向量，对于i∈{1,…,Natoms}，定义为zi=vmin+(i-1)(vmax-vmin)/(Natoms-1)。时刻t的近似分布dt定义在该支持集上，每个原子i上的概率质量为pθ^i(St,At)，使得dt=(z, pθ(St,At))。目标是更新θ，使得该分布紧密匹配实际收益分布。

items.en: To learn the probability masses, the key insight is that return distributions satisfy a variant of Bellman’s equation. For a given state Stsubscript𝑆𝑡S_{t} and action Atsubscript𝐴𝑡A_{t}, the distribution of the returns under the optimal policy π∗superscript𝜋\pi^{*} should match a target distribution defined by taking the distribution for the next state St+1subscript𝑆𝑡1S_{t+1} and action at+1∗=π∗​(St+1)subscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑡1superscript𝜋subscript𝑆𝑡1a^{*}_{t+1}=\pi^{*}(S_{t+1}), contracting it towards zero according to the discount, and shifting it by the reward (or distribution of rewards, in the stochastic case). A distributional variant of Q-learning is then derived by first constructing a new support for the target distribution, and then minimizing the Kullbeck-Leibler divergence between the distribution dtsubscript𝑑𝑡d_{t} and the target distribution dt′≡(Rt+1+γt+1​𝒛,𝒑θ¯​(St+1,a¯t+1∗))subscriptsuperscript𝑑′𝑡subscript𝑅𝑡1subscript𝛾𝑡1𝒛subscript𝒑¯𝜃subscript𝑆𝑡1subscriptsuperscript¯𝑎𝑡1d^{\prime}_{t}\equiv(R_{t+1}+\gamma_{t+1}\bm{z},~{}~{}\bm{p}_{\overline{\theta}}(S_{t+1},\overline{a}^{*}_{t+1})),
items.zh: 为了学习概率质量，关键洞察是收益分布满足贝尔曼方程的一个变体。对于给定的状态St和动作At，最优策略π*下的收益分布应与目标分布匹配，该目标分布由下一状态St+1和动作a*_{t+1}=π*(St+1)的分布定义，根据折扣将其向零收缩，并加上奖励（在随机情况下为奖励分布）。然后通过首先构建目标分布的新支持集，然后最小化分布dt与目标分布d'_t≡(R_{t+1}+γ_{t+1}z, p_θ̄(S_{t+1}, ā*_{t+1}))之间的KL散度，推导出分布Q学习的一个变体。

items.en: Here Φ𝒛subscriptΦ𝒛\Phi_{\bm{z}} is a L2-projection of the target distribution onto the fixed support 𝒛𝒛\bm{z}, and a¯t+1∗=arg⁡maxa⁡qθ¯​(St+1,a)subscriptsuperscript¯𝑎𝑡1subscript𝑎subscript𝑞¯𝜃subscript𝑆𝑡1𝑎\overline{a}^{*}_{t+1}=\operatorname*{\arg\!\max}_{a}q_{\overline{\theta}}(S_{t+1},a) is the greedy action with respect to the mean action values qθ¯​(St+1,a)=𝒛⊤​𝒑θ​(St+1,a)subscript𝑞¯𝜃subscript𝑆𝑡1𝑎superscript𝒛topsubscript𝒑𝜃subscript𝑆𝑡1𝑎q_{\overline{\theta}}(S_{t+1},a)=\bm{z}^{\top}\bm{p}_{\theta}(S_{t+1},a) in state St+1subscript𝑆𝑡1S_{t+1}.
items.zh: 这里Φ_z是目标分布到固定支持集z上的L2投影，ā*_{t+1}=argmax_a q_θ̄(S_{t+1},a)是相对于状态S_{t+1}中平均动作值q_θ̄(S_{t+1},a)=z^T p_θ(S_{t+1},a)的贪心动作。

items.en: As in the non-distributional case, we can use a frozen copy of the parameters θ¯¯𝜃\overline{\theta} to construct the target distribution. The parametrized distribution can be represented by a neural network, as in DQN, but with Natoms×Nactionssubscript𝑁atomssubscript𝑁actionsN_{\text{atoms}}\times N_{\text{actions}} outputs. A softmax is applied independently for each action dimension of the output to ensure that the distribution for each action is appropriately normalized.
items.zh: 与非分布情况一样，我们可以使用参数的冻结副本θ̄来构建目标分布。参数化分布可以由神经网络表示，如DQN中，但输出为Natoms×Nactions个。对输出的每个动作维度独立应用softmax，以确保每个动作的分布被适当归一化。

items.en: The limitations of exploring using ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon-greedy policies are clear in games such as Montezuma’s Revenge, where many actions must be executed to collect the first reward. Noisy Nets (?) propose a noisy linear layer that combines a deterministic and noisy stream,
items.zh: 使用ε-贪心策略进行探索的局限性在诸如Montezuma's Revenge等游戏中显而易见，在这些游戏中需要执行许多动作才能获得第一个奖励。Noisy Nets（?）提出了一种结合确定性和噪声流的噪声线性层，

items.en: where ϵbsuperscriptitalic-ϵ𝑏\epsilon^{b} and ϵwsuperscriptitalic-ϵ𝑤\epsilon^{w} are random variables, and ⊙direct-product\odot denotes the element-wise product. This transformation can then be used in place of the standard linear 𝒚=𝒃+W​𝒙𝒚𝒃W𝒙\bm{y}=\bm{b}+\textbf{W}\bm{x}. Over time, the network can learn to ignore the noisy stream, but will do so at different rates in different parts of the state space, allowing state-conditional exploration with a form of self-annealing.
items.zh: 其中ε^b和ε^w是随机变量，⊙表示逐元素乘积。然后可以用此变换代替标准线性变换y=b+Wx。随着时间的推移，网络可以学会忽略噪声流，但在状态空间的不同部分会以不同速率进行，从而允许具有自退火形式的状态条件探索。

items.en: In this paper we integrate all the aforementioned components into a single integrated agent, which we call Rainbow.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们将所有前述组件集成到一个统一的智能体中，我们称之为Rainbow。

items.en: First, we replace the 1-step distributional loss (3) with a multi-step variant. We construct the target distribution by contracting the value distribution in St+nsubscript𝑆𝑡𝑛S_{t+n} according to the cumulative discount, and shifting it by the truncated n𝑛n-step discounted return. This corresponds to defining the target distribution as dt(n)=(Rt(n)+γt(n)​𝒛,𝒑θ¯​(St+n,at+n∗))subscriptsuperscript𝑑𝑛𝑡subscriptsuperscript𝑅𝑛𝑡superscriptsubscript𝛾𝑡𝑛𝒛subscript𝒑¯𝜃subscript𝑆𝑡𝑛subscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑡𝑛d^{(n)}_{t}=(R^{(n)}_{t}+\gamma_{t}^{(n)}\bm{z},~{}~{}\bm{p}_{\overline{\theta}}(S_{t+n},a^{*}_{t+n})). The resulting loss is

items.en: where, again, Φ𝒛subscriptΦ𝒛\Phi_{\bm{z}} is the projection onto 𝒛𝒛\bm{z}.
items.zh: 其中，再次，Φ_z是到z上的投影。

items.en: We combine the multi-step distributional loss with double Q-learning by using the greedy action in St+nsubscript𝑆𝑡𝑛S_{t+n} selected according to the online network as the bootstrap action at+n∗subscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑡𝑛a^{*}_{t+n}, and evaluating such action using the target network.
items.zh: 我们通过使用根据在线网络选择的S_{t+n}中的贪心动作作为引导动作a*_{t+n}，并使用目标网络评估该动作，将多步分布损失与双Q学习相结合。

items.en: In standard proportional prioritized replay (?) the absolute TD error is used to prioritize the transitions. This can be computed in the distributional setting, using the mean action values. However, in our experiments all distributional Rainbow variants prioritize transitions by the KL loss, since this is what the algorithm is minimizing:
items.zh: 在标准比例优先回放（?）中，使用绝对TD误差来优先化转换。在分布设置中，可以使用平均动作值来计算。然而，在我们的实验中，所有分布Rainbow变体都使用KL损失来优先化转换，因为这是算法最小化的目标：

items.en: The KL loss as priority might be more robust to noisy stochastic environments because the loss can continue to decrease even when the returns are not deterministic.
items.zh: KL损失作为优先级可能对噪声随机环境更鲁棒，因为即使收益不是确定性的，损失也可以继续减小。

items.en: The network architecture is a dueling network architecture adapted for use with return distributions. The network has a shared representation fξ​(s)subscript𝑓𝜉𝑠f_{\xi}(s), which is then fed into a value stream vηsubscript𝑣𝜂v_{\eta} with Natomssubscript𝑁atomsN_{\text{atoms}} outputs, and into an advantage stream aξsubscript𝑎𝜉a_{\xi} with Natoms×Nactionssubscript𝑁atomssubscript𝑁actionsN_{\text{atoms}}\times N_{\text{actions}} outputs, where aξi​(fξ​(s),a)subscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑖𝜉subscript𝑓𝜉𝑠𝑎a^{i}_{\xi}(f_{\xi}(s),a) will denote the output corresponding to atom i𝑖i and action a𝑎a. For each atom zisuperscript𝑧𝑖z^{i}, the value and advantage streams are aggregated, as in dueling DQN, and then passed through a softmax layer to obtain the normalised parametric distributions used to estimate the returns’ distributions:
items.zh: 网络架构是适用于收益分布的决斗网络架构。网络具有共享表示f_ξ(s)，然后馈入具有Natoms个输出的值流v_η，以及具有Natoms×Nactions个输出的优势流a_ξ，其中a_ξ^i(f_ξ(s),a)将表示对应于原子i和动作a的输出。对于每个原子z^i，值和优势流被聚合，如决斗DQN中，然后通过softmax层以获得用于估计收益分布的归一化参数分布：

items.en: where ϕ=fξ​(s)italic-ϕsubscript𝑓𝜉𝑠\phi=f_{\xi}(s) and a¯ψi​(s)=1Nactions​∑a′aψi​(ϕ,a′)subscriptsuperscript¯𝑎𝑖𝜓𝑠1subscript𝑁actionssubscriptsuperscript𝑎′subscriptsuperscript𝑎𝑖𝜓italic-ϕsuperscript𝑎′\overline{a}^{i}_{\psi}(s)=\frac{1}{N_{\text{actions}}}\sum_{a^{\prime}}a^{i}_{\psi}(\phi,a^{\prime}).
items.zh: 其中φ=f_ξ(s)，ā_ψ^i(s)=(1/Nactions)∑_{a'} a_ψ^i(φ,a')。

items.en: We then replace all linear layers with their noisy equivalent described in Equation (4). Within these noisy linear layers we use factorised Gaussian noise (?) to reduce the number of independent noise variables.
items.zh: 然后我们将所有线性层替换为方程（4）中描述的噪声等效层。在这些噪声线性层中，我们使用因子化高斯噪声（?）来减少独立噪声变量的数量。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Each plot shows, for several agents, the number of games where they have achieved at least a given fraction of human performance, as a function of time. From left to right we consider the 20%, 50%, 100%, 200% and 500% thresholds. On the first row we compare Rainbow to the baselines. On the second row we compare Rainbow to its ablations.
items.capZh: 图2：每个图显示了对于几个智能体，它们达到至少给定人类表现分数的游戏数量随时间的变化。从左到右我们考虑20%、50%、100%、200%和500%的阈值。第一行将Rainbow与基线进行比较。第二行将Rainbow与其消融变体进行比较。

items.en: We now describe the methods and setup used for configuring and evaluating the learning agents.
items.zh: 我们现在描述用于配置和评估学习智能体的方法和设置。

items.en: We evaluated all agents on 57 Atari 2600 games from the arcade learning environment (?). We follow the training and evaluation procedures of ? (?) and van Hasselt et al. (?). The average scores of the agent are evaluated during training, every 1M steps in the environment, by suspending learning and evaluating the latest agent for 500K frames. Episodes are truncated at 108K frames (or 30 minutes of simulated play), as in van Hasselt et al. (?).
items.zh: 我们在街机学习环境（?）的57个Atari 2600游戏上评估了所有智能体。我们遵循?（?）和van Hasselt等人（?）的训练和评估程序。在训练期间，每在环境中进行1M步，通过暂停学习并评估最新智能体500K帧来评估智能体的平均得分。剧集在108K帧（或模拟游戏30分钟）处截断，如van Hasselt等人（?）所述。

items.en: Agents’ scores are normalized, per game, so that 0% corresponds to a random agent and 100% to the average score of a human expert. Normalized scores can be aggregated across all Atari levels to compare the performance of different agents. It is common to track the median human normalized performance across all games. We also consider the number of games where the agent’s performance is above some fraction of human performance, to disentangle where improvements in the median come from. The mean human normalized performance is potentially less informative, as it is dominated by a few games (e.g., Atlantis) where agents achieve scores orders of magnitude higher than humans do.
items.zh: 智能体的得分按游戏进行归一化，使得0%对应随机智能体，100%对应人类专家的平均得分。归一化得分可以跨所有Atari关卡汇总，以比较不同智能体的性能。通常跟踪所有游戏中人类归一化得分的中位数。我们还考虑了智能体性能超过人类性能某个分数的游戏数量，以厘清中位数改进的来源。平均人类归一化性能可能信息量较小，因为它被少数游戏（例如Atlantis）主导，在这些游戏中智能体取得的得分比人类高出几个数量级。

items.en: Besides tracking the median performance as a function of environment steps, at the end of training we re-evaluate the best agent snapshot using two different testing regimes. In the no-ops starts regime, we insert a random number (up to 30) of no-op actions at the beginning of each episode (as we do also in training). In the human starts regime, episodes are initialized with points randomly sampled from the initial portion of human expert trajectories (?); the difference between the two regimes indicates the extent to which the agent has over-fit to its own trajectories.
items.zh: 除了跟踪作为环境步数函数的中位数性能外，在训练结束时，我们使用两种不同的测试机制重新评估最佳智能体快照。在无操作启动机制中，我们在每个回合开始时插入随机数量（最多30个）的无操作动作（训练时也是如此）。在人类启动机制中，回合从人类专家轨迹初始部分随机采样的点开始（?）；两种机制之间的差异表明智能体对其自身轨迹的过拟合程度。

items.en: Due to space constraints, we focus on aggregate results across games. However, in the appendix we provide full learning curves for all games and all agents, as well as detailed comparison tables of raw and normalized scores, in both the no-op and human starts testing regimes.
items.zh: 由于篇幅限制，我们专注于跨游戏的汇总结果。然而，在附录中，我们提供了所有游戏和所有智能体的完整学习曲线，以及在无操作和人类启动测试机制下的原始和归一化得分的详细比较表。

items.en: All Rainbow’s components have a number of hyper-parameters. The combinatorial space of hyper-parameters is too large for an exhaustive search, therefore we have performed limited tuning. For each component, we started with the values used in the paper that introduced this component, and tuned the most sensitive among hyper-parameters by manual coordinate descent.
items.zh: 所有Rainbow的组件都有许多超参数。超参数的组合空间太大，无法进行穷举搜索，因此我们进行了有限的调优。对于每个组件，我们从引入该组件的论文中使用的值开始，并通过手动坐标下降调整最敏感的超参数。

items.en: DQN and its variants do not perform learning updates during the first 200​K200𝐾200K frames, to ensure sufficiently uncorrelated updates. We have found that, with prioritized replay, it is possible to start learning sooner, after only 80​K80𝐾80K frames.
items.zh: DQN及其变体在前200K帧期间不执行学习更新，以确保更新足够不相关。我们发现，使用优先回放，可以在仅80K帧后更早地开始学习。

items.en: DQN starts with an exploration ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon of 1, corresponding to acting uniformly at random; it anneals the amount of exploration over the first 4M frames, to a final value of 0.1 (lowered to 0.01 in later variants). Whenever using Noisy Nets, we acted fully greedily (ϵ=0italic-ϵ0\epsilon=0), with a value of 0.50.50.5 for the σ0subscript𝜎0\sigma_{0} hyper-parameter used to initialize the weights in the noisy stream111The noise was generated on the GPU. Tensorflow noise generation can be unreliable on GPU. If generating the noise on the CPU, lowering σ0subscript𝜎0\sigma_{0} to 0.1 may be helpful.. For agents without Noisy Nets, we used ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon-greedy but decreased the exploration rate faster than was previously used, annealing ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon to 0.01 in the first 250​K250𝐾250K frames.
items.zh: DQN的探索率ε初始为1，对应完全随机行动；在前400万帧内将探索量退火至最终值0.1（在后续变体中降至0.01）。当使用噪声网络时，我们完全贪婪地行动（ε=0），用于初始化噪声流权重的σ0超参数值为0.5¹。对于没有噪声网络的智能体，我们使用ε-贪婪，但探索率比之前更快地降低，在前25万帧内将ε退火至0.01。

items.en: We used the Adam optimizer (?), which we found less sensitive to the choice of the learning rate than RMSProp. DQN uses a learning rate of α=0.00025𝛼0.00025\alpha=0.00025 In all Rainbow’s variants we used a learning rate of α/4𝛼4\alpha/4, selected among {α/2,α/4,α/6}𝛼2𝛼4𝛼6\{\alpha/2,\alpha/4,\alpha/6\}, and a value of 1.5×10−41.5superscript1041.5\times 10^{-4} for Adam’s ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon hyper-parameter.
items.zh: 我们使用了Adam优化器（?），发现它对学习率的选择不如RMSProp敏感。DQN使用学习率α=0.00025。在Rainbow的所有变体中，我们使用学习率α/4，从{α/2, α/4, α/6}中选择，Adam的ε超参数值为1.5×10⁻⁴。

items.en: For replay prioritization we used the recommended proportional variant, with priority exponent ω𝜔\omega of 0.50.50.5, and linearly increased the importance sampling exponent β𝛽\beta from 0.4 to 1 over the course of training. The priority exponent ω𝜔\omega was tuned comparing values of {0.4,0.5,0.7}0.40.50.7\{0.4,0.5,0.7\}. Using the KL loss of distributional DQN as priority, we have observed that performance is very robust to the choice of ω𝜔\omega.
items.zh: 对于回放优先级，我们使用了推荐的成比例变体，优先级指数ω为0.5，并在训练过程中将重要性采样指数β从0.4线性增加到1。优先级指数ω通过比较{0.4, 0.5, 0.7}的值进行调优。使用分布DQN的KL损失作为优先级，我们观察到性能对ω的选择非常鲁棒。

items.en: The value of n𝑛n in multi-step learning is a sensitive hyper-parameter of Rainbow. We compared values of n=1, 3,and ​5𝑛13and 5n=1,\ 3,\ \text{and }5. We observed that both n=3𝑛3n=3 and 555 did well initially, but overall n=3𝑛3n=3 performed the best by the end.
items.zh: 多步学习中的n值是Rainbow的一个敏感超参数。我们比较了n=1、3和5的值。我们观察到n=3和5在初始阶段都表现良好，但总体而言n=3在结束时表现最佳。

items.en: The hyper-parameters (see Table 1) are identical across all 57 games, i.e., the Rainbow agent really is a single agent setup that performs well across all the games.
items.zh: 超参数（见表1）在所有57个游戏中相同，即Rainbow智能体确实是一个在所有游戏中表现良好的单一智能体设置。

items.en: In this section we analyse the main experimental results. First, we show that Rainbow compares favorably to several published agents. Then we perform ablation studies, comparing several variants of the agent, each corresponding to removing a single component from Rainbow.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们分析主要实验结果。首先，我们展示Rainbow与几个已发表的智能体相比具有优势。然后，我们进行消融研究，比较智能体的几个变体，每个变体对应从Rainbow中移除一个组件。

items.en: In Figure 1 we compare the Rainbow’s performance (measured in terms of the median human normalized score across games) to the corresponding curves for A3C, DQN, DDQN, Prioritized DDQN, Dueling DDQN, Distributional DQN, and Noisy DQN. We thank the authors of the Dueling and Prioritized agents for providing the learning curves of these, and report our own re-runs for DQN, A3C, DDQN, Distributional DQN and Noisy DQN. The performance of Rainbow is significantly better than any of the baselines, both in data efficiency, as well as in final performance. Note that we match final performance of DQN after 7M frames, surpass the best final performance of these baselines in 44M frames, and reach substantially improved final performance.
items.zh: 在图1中，我们将Rainbow的性能（以跨游戏的人类归一化得分中位数衡量）与A3C、DQN、DDQN、优先DDQN、决斗DDQN、分布DQN和噪声DQN的相应曲线进行比较。我们感谢决斗和优先智能体的作者提供了这些学习曲线，并报告了我们自己对DQN、A3C、DDQN、分布DQN和噪声DQN的重新运行结果。Rainbow的性能在数据效率和最终性能方面都显著优于任何基线。请注意，我们在700万帧后匹配了DQN的最终性能，在4400万帧后超越了这些基线的最佳最终性能，并达到了显著改进的最终性能。

items.en: In the final evaluations of the agent, after the end of training, Rainbow achieves a median score of 223% in the no-ops regime; in the human starts regime we measured a median score of 153%. In Table 2 we compare these scores to the published median scores of the individual baselines.
items.zh: 在训练结束后的最终评估中，Rainbow在无操作机制下达到223%的中位数得分；在人类启动机制下，我们测得中位数得分为153%。在表2中，我们将这些得分与各个基线的已发表中位数得分进行比较。

items.en: In Figure 2 (top row) we plot the number of games where an agent has reached some specified level of human normalized performance. From left to right, the subplots show on how many games the different agents have achieved 20%, 50%, 100%, 200% and 500% human normalized performance. This allows us to identify where the overall improvements in performance come from. Note that the gap in performance between Rainbow and other agents is apparent at all levels of performance: the Rainbow agent is improving scores on games where the baseline agents were already good, as well as improving in games where baseline agents are still far from human performance.
items.zh: 在图2（顶行）中，我们绘制了智能体达到某个指定人类归一化性能水平的游戏数量。从左到右，子图显示了不同智能体在多少游戏上达到了20%、50%、100%、200%和500%的人类归一化性能。这使我们能够确定整体性能改进的来源。请注意，Rainbow与其他智能体之间的性能差距在所有性能水平上都很明显：Rainbow智能体在基线智能体已经表现良好的游戏上提高了得分，也在基线智能体仍远低于人类性能的游戏上有所改进。

items.en: As in the original DQN setup, we ran each agent on a single GPU. The 7M frames required to match DQN’s final performance correspond to less than 10 hours of wall-clock time. A full run of 200M frames corresponds to approximately 10 days, and this varies by less than 20% between all of the discussed variants. The literature contains many alternative training setups that improve performance as a function of wall-clock time by exploiting parallelism, e.g., ? (?), ? (?), and ? (?). Properly relating the performance across such very different hardware/compute resources is non-trivial, so we focused exclusively on algorithmic variations, allowing apples-to-apples comparisons. While we consider them to be important and complementary, we leave questions of scalability and parallelism to future work.
items.zh: 与原始DQN设置一样，我们在单个GPU上运行每个智能体。匹配DQN最终性能所需的700万帧对应不到10小时的挂钟时间。完整的2亿帧运行大约需要10天，并且所有讨论的变体之间的差异小于20%。文献中包含许多通过利用并行性来提高挂钟时间性能的替代训练设置，例如? (?)、? (?)和? (?)。正确关联如此不同的硬件/计算资源之间的性能并非易事，因此我们专注于算法变化，以便进行同类比较。虽然我们认为这些很重要且互补，但我们将可扩展性和并行性问题留给未来工作。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Median human-normalized performance across 57 Atari games, as a function of time. We compare our integrated agent (rainbow-colored) to DQN (gray) and to six different ablations (dashed lines). Curves are smoothed with a moving average over 5 points.
items.capZh: 图3：57个Atari游戏的中位数人类归一化性能随时间的变化。我们将我们的集成智能体（彩虹色）与DQN（灰色）以及六个不同的消融变体（虚线）进行比较。曲线使用5点移动平均进行平滑。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Performance drops of ablation agents on all 57 Atari games. Performance is the area under the learning curve, normalized relative to the Rainbow agent and DQN. Two games where DQN outperforms Rainbow are omitted. The ablation leading to the strongest drop is highlighted for each game. The removal of either prioritization or multi-step learning reduces performance across most games, but the contribution of each component varies substantially per game.
items.capZh: 图4：消融智能体在所有57个Atari游戏上的性能下降。性能是学习曲线下的面积，相对于Rainbow智能体和DQN进行归一化。省略了DQN优于Rainbow的两个游戏。每个游戏中导致最强下降的消融被突出显示。移除优先回放或多步学习会降低大多数游戏的性能，但每个组件的贡献因游戏而异。

items.en: Since Rainbow integrates several different ideas into a single agent, we conducted additional experiments to understand the contribution of the various components, in the context of this specific combination.
items.zh: 由于Rainbow将几种不同的想法集成到一个智能体中，我们进行了额外的实验，以了解各种组件在这种特定组合中的贡献。

items.en: To gain a better understanding of the contribution of each component to the Rainbow agent, we performed ablation studies. In each ablation, we removed one component from the full Rainbow combination. Figure 3 shows a comparison for median normalized score of the full Rainbow to six ablated variants. Figure 2 (bottom row) shows a more detailed breakdown of how these ablations perform relative to different thresholds of human normalized performance, and Figure 4 shows the gain or loss from each ablation for every game, averaged over the full learning run.
items.zh: 为了更好地理解每个组件对Rainbow智能体的贡献，我们进行了消融研究。在每次消融中，我们从完整的Rainbow组合中移除一个组件。图3显示了完整Rainbow与六个消融变体的中位数归一化得分比较。图2（底行）显示了这些消融相对于不同人类归一化性能阈值的更详细分解，图4显示了每个游戏每次消融的增益或损失，在整个学习运行中取平均。

items.en: Prioritized replay and multi-step learning were the two most crucial components of Rainbow, in that removing either component caused a large drop in median performance. Unsurprisingly, the removal of either of these hurt early performance. Perhaps more surprisingly, the removal of multi-step learning also hurt final performance. Zooming in on individual games (Figure 4), we see both components helped almost uniformly across games (the full Rainbow performed better than either ablation in 53 games out of 57).
items.zh: 优先回放和多步学习是Rainbow的两个最关键组件，移除任一组件都会导致中位数性能大幅下降。毫不奇怪，移除其中任何一个都会损害早期性能。也许更令人惊讶的是，移除多步学习也损害了最终性能。放大到单个游戏（图4），我们看到这两个组件几乎在所有游戏上都有帮助（完整Rainbow在57个游戏中的53个中表现优于任一消融）。

items.en: Distributional Q-learning ranked immediately below the previous techniques for relevance to the agent’s performance. Notably, in early learning no difference is apparent, as shown in Figure 3, where for the first 40 million frames the distributional-ablation performed as well as the full agent. However, without distributions, the performance of the agent then started lagging behind. When the results are separated relatively to human performance in Figure 2, we see that the distributional-ablation primarily seems to lags on games that are above human level or near it.
items.zh: 分布性Q学习在智能体性能相关性上紧随前述技术之后。值得注意的是，在早期学习中无明显差异，如图3所示，在前4000万帧中，分布性消融的表现与完整智能体相当。然而，没有分布性后，智能体的性能开始落后。当结果按人类相对表现分离时（图2），我们看到分布性消融似乎主要在对人类水平以上或接近的游戏上滞后。

items.en: In terms of median performance, the agent performed better when Noisy Nets were included; when these are removed and exploration is delegated to the traditional ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon-greedy mechanism, performance was worse in aggregate (red line in Figure 3). While the removal of Noisy Nets produced a large drop in performance for several games, it also provided small increases in other games (Figure 4).
items.zh: 就中位数性能而言，包含Noisy Nets时智能体表现更好；当移除Noisy Nets并将探索委托给传统的ε-贪婪机制时，整体性能更差（图3红线）。虽然移除Noisy Nets导致多个游戏性能大幅下降，但在其他游戏中也有小幅提升（图4）。

items.en: In aggregate, we did not observe a significant difference when removing the dueling network from the full Rainbow. The median score, however, hides the fact that the impact of Dueling differed between games, as shown by Figure 4. Figure 2 shows that Dueling perhaps provided some improvement on games with above-human performance levels (# games >200%absentpercent200>200\%), and some degradation on games with sub-human performance (# games >20%absentpercent20>20\%).
items.zh: 总体而言，我们未观察到从完整Rainbow中移除决斗网络后出现显著差异。然而，中位数分数掩盖了决斗网络影响因游戏而异的事实，如图4所示。图2显示，决斗网络可能对超人水平性能的游戏（# games >200%）有所提升，而对低于人类水平的游戏（# games >20%）有所下降。

items.en: Also in the case of double Q-learning, the observed difference in median performance (Figure 3) is limited, with the component sometimes harming or helping depending on the game (Figure 4). To further investigate the role of double Q-learning, we compared the predictions of our trained agents to the actual discounted returns computed from clipped rewards. Comparing Rainbow to the agent where double Q-learning was ablated, we observed that the actual returns are often higher than 101010 and therefore fall outside the support of the distribution, spanning from −1010-10 to +1010+10. This leads to underestimated returns, rather than overestimations. We hypothesize that clipping the values to this constrained range counteracts the overestimation bias of Q-learning. Note, however, that the importance of double Q-learning may increase if the support of the distributions is expanded.
items.zh: 同样在双Q学习的情况下，观察到的中位数性能差异（图3）有限，该组件有时根据游戏不同而有害或有益（图4）。为进一步研究双Q学习的作用，我们将训练好的智能体的预测与从裁剪奖励计算的实际折扣回报进行比较。比较Rainbow与消融双Q学习的智能体，我们发现实际回报通常高于10，因此落在分布支持范围（-10到+10）之外。这导致回报被低估，而非高估。我们假设将值裁剪到这一受限范围抵消了Q学习的过估计偏差。但注意，如果分布支持范围扩大，双Q学习的重要性可能会增加。

items.en: In the appendix, for each game we show final performance and learning curves for Rainbow, its ablations, and baselines.
items.zh: 在附录中，我们展示了每个游戏的最终性能和学习曲线，包括Rainbow、其消融版本及基线。

items.en: We have demonstrated that several improvements to DQN can be successfully integrated into a single learning algorithm that achieves state-of-the-art performance. Moreover, we have shown that within the integrated algorithm, all but one of the components provided clear performance benefits. There are many more algorithmic components that we were not able to include, which would be promising candidates for further experiments on integrated agents. Among the many possible candidates, we discuss several below.
items.zh: 我们证明了DQN的多项改进可以成功整合到一个单一学习算法中，实现最先进的性能。此外，我们展示了在整合算法中，除一个组件外，所有组件都提供了明确的性能提升。还有许多我们未能包含的算法组件，这些将是进一步集成智能体实验的有前景候选。在众多可能候选者中，我们讨论以下几个。

items.en: We have focused here on value-based methods in the Q-learning family. We have not considered purely policy-based RL algorithms such as trust-region policy optimisation (?), nor actor-critic methods (?; ?).
items.zh: 我们在此专注于Q学习家族中的基于值方法。我们未考虑纯基于策略的强化学习算法，如信任区域策略优化（?），也未考虑演员-评论家方法（?; ?）。

items.en: A number of algorithms exploit a sequence of data to achieve improved learning efficiency. Optimality tightening (?) uses multi-step returns to construct additional inequality bounds, instead of using them to replace the 1-step targets used in Q-learning. Eligibility traces allow a soft combination over n-step returns (?). However, sequential methods all leverage more computation per gradient than the multi-step targets used in Rainbow. Furthermore, introducing prioritized sequence replay raises questions of how to store, replay and prioritise sequences.
items.zh: 许多算法利用数据序列来提高学习效率。最优性收紧（?）使用多步回报构建额外不等式边界，而非替代Q学习中使用的1步目标。资格迹允许对n步回报进行软组合（?）。然而，序列方法每个梯度比Rainbow中使用的多步目标利用更多计算。此外，引入优先序列回放引发了如何存储、回放和优先化序列的问题。

items.en: Episodic control (?) also focuses on data efficiency, and was shown to be very effective in some domains. It improves early learning by using episodic memory as a complementary learning system, capable of immediately re-enacting successful action sequences.
items.zh: 情景控制（?）也关注数据效率，并在某些领域被证明非常有效。它通过使用情景记忆作为互补学习系统来改善早期学习，能够立即重放成功的动作序列。

items.en: Besides Noisy Nets, numerous other exploration methods could also be useful algorithmic ingredients: among these Bootstrapped DQN (?), intrinsic motivation (?) and count-based exploration (?). Integration of these alternative components is fruitful subject for further research.
items.zh: 除了Noisy Nets，许多其他探索方法也可能是有用的算法成分：包括Bootstrapped DQN（?）、内在动机（?）和基于计数的探索（?）。整合这些替代组件是进一步研究的有益课题。

items.en: In this paper we have focused on the core learning updates, without exploring alternative computational architectures. Asynchronous learning from parallel copies of the environment, as in A3C (?), Gorila (?), or Evolution Strategies (?), can be effective in speeding up learning, at least in terms of wall-clock time. Note, however, they can be less data efficient.
items.zh: 本文中我们专注于核心学习更新，未探索替代计算架构。从环境并行副本进行异步学习，如A3C（?）、Gorila（?）或进化策略（?），可以加速学习，至少在挂钟时间上。但注意，它们可能数据效率较低。

items.en: Hierarchical RL has also been applied with success to several complex Atari games. Among successful applications of HRL we highlight h-DQN (?) and Feudal Networks (?).
items.zh: 分层强化学习也已成功应用于多个复杂Atari游戏。在HRL的成功应用中，我们强调h-DQN（?）和Feudal Networks（?）。

items.en: The state representation could also be made more efficient by exploiting auxiliary tasks such as pixel control or feature control (?), supervised predictions (?) or successor features (?).
items.zh: 状态表示也可以通过利用辅助任务（如像素控制或特征控制（?）、监督预测（?）或后继特征（?））来提高效率。

items.en: To evaluate Rainbow fairly against the baselines, we have followed the common domain modifications of clipping rewards, fixed action-repetition, and frame-stacking, but these might be removed by other learning algorithm improvements. Pop-Art normalization (?) allows reward clipping to be removed, while preserving a similar level of performance. Fine-grained action repetition (?) enabled to learn how to repeat actions. A recurrent state network (?) can learn a temporal state representation, replacing the fixed stack of observation frames. In general, we believe that exposing the real game to the agent is a promising direction for future research.
items.zh: 为了公平评估Rainbow与基线，我们遵循了常见的领域修改，如裁剪奖励、固定动作重复和帧堆叠，但这些可能被其他学习算法改进所移除。Pop-Art归一化（?）允许移除奖励裁剪，同时保持相似性能水平。细粒度动作重复（?）使得学习如何重复动作成为可能。循环状态网络（?）可以学习时间状态表示，替代固定的观察帧堆叠。总的来说，我们相信向智能体暴露真实游戏是未来研究的一个有前景方向。
